content:
✅ Why This Works:
• Maintains academic rigor while allowing flexibility.
• Research is required but varies based on chosen path.
• Prevents students from entirely avoiding research-based writing.

📆 3. Weekly Structure for a Once-a-Week Class

✅ Clarification: This class meets once a week for three hours.
• Alternating A & B schedules for Weeks 1-10.
• Weeks 11-12: Two Films (Contrasting Styles & Themes).
• Weeks 13-15: Research, Peer Review, Final Reflection.

🔄 A & B Weekly Class Structures
